SUBJECT: I'm sorry...

convertlinks

Andy Jenkins here... and I want to explain
exactly WHY we pulled the rug out from under
you...

If you didn't hear about it already, we pulled
SMARTS off the market Friday afternoon.

That was NOT our plan... we had publicly
announced that we were raising the price, but we
did NOT say we were pulling the product off the
market.

That means that lots of people were shocked when
they found they couldn't get SMARTS at any
price.

Let me explain what happened...

The last few days have been a blur, but
somewhere around 36 hours ago we got some
breaking news...

It seems one of the Social Media sites we talked
about in our "No Secrets" video stopped allowing
outgoing links.

The site is scribd.com.

Almost immediately, at least one blogger pointed
an accusing finger at SMARTS, and the fact that
we spoiled a good thing by publicizing how
scribd.com was great for creating incoming links
to your site.

IMPORTANT: Using scribd.com was just one of
HUNDREDS of different things we are teaching our
SMARTS members.

Another key point - the social media landscape
is ALWAYS changing like this. These sites are
continually changing the rules... which is one
of the reasons that SMARTS teaches the
underlying strategies that will ALWAYS win in
social media.

NEVERTHELESS, as this situation developed, we
made the decision on Friday that we were going
to completely pull SMARTS off the market.

This might have been a rash decision, but we
thought it was the best thing to do at the time
to protect the integrity of our SMARTS
community. We're going to watch how this plays
out hour-by-hour.

If you got caught in the crossfire and missed
out on SMARTS, you have my sincere apology.


best regards,
Andy Jenkins
